statement: In every magma, Equation 799 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * w))`) implies Equation 2568 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0613
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) x)) y)
